title: hebe stenophylla
intro: Hebe stenophylla, also known as the 'New Zealand mountain tea' or 'tī kōuka', is a species of flowering plant in the hebe family, native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and acting as an antibacterial agent. Hebe stenophylla can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it easily accessible for those looking to harness its potential medicinal and health benefits.
